# Copirate Reconcile Support - Examples

## Recommendation Summary Shape

```text
Recommendation Summary (scoped):
- Scope Mode: Recent Topic/Focus
- Selected Realm: prompt policy / logging style
- Related Work Orders: WORK_ORDER-example-refactor.md, WORK_ORDER-example-doc-sync.md
- Scoped Companion Artifacts: decision note, validation handoff
- Time Window: Last 14 days
- DELETE: 4 memories
- DOWNGRADE: 2 memories
- KEEP: 5 memories
- UPDATE ARTIFACT: 2

Proceed with cleanup? (yes/no)
```

## Closeout Summary Shape

```text
Memory reconciliation complete.
Deleted 4 obsolete planning memories, downgraded 2 historical notes, updated 2 scoped companion artifacts, and created 1 authoritative current-state memory.
Retrieval should now favor the current implementation rather than interim planning artifacts.
```
